title: Medieval Arms
description:
The game is like a medieval version of Battlefield 1942, where you spawn into a map and capture objectives / kill enemies. You can choose between to classes atm, theres a man at arms (sword and shield) and then a ranger / archer with bow and arrow and a sword as offhand. 

It's supposed to be a chill game where you run around killing dudes, there isnt supposed to be any grand meaning behind it. So if you like those sort of games, this is the game for you. 

You are a commander of a small army and you have to overthrow the evil king. You do this by fighting his troops in different locations around the land.

Level up and become stronger, acquire gear and better stats as strength and stamina, to be stronger and survive longer.
description_short: Medieval Arms is thought as a sandbox'y action/ combat game, where you run around and fight untill time or points run out.
